macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Dallas Fed President Logan Calls for Interest-Rate Hike, First Under New Chair Warsh
items.summary: Dallas Federal Reserve President Lorie Logan publicly advocated for an interest-rate hike on Thursday, becoming the first of Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's new colleagues to do so and signaling potential dissent at the next meeting in under two weeks [1].

items.title: U.S. Producer Price Index (PPI) Surges 5.5% Yearly, Core PPI Up 0.2% Monthly
items.summary: The latest economic data shows U.S. Producer Price Index (PPI) rising 5.5% year-over-year and Core PPI increasing 0.2% month-over-month, indicating persistent inflation pressures [2].

items.title: U.S. Stock Futures Decline as S&P 500 and Nasdaq Drop Ahead of Inflation Data
items.summary: U.S. stock index futures were subdued on Thursday with S&P futures down 0.4% and Nasdaq off 0.6% as investors paused after a two-day rally and chip stocks remained under pressure [1][5].

items.title: Oil Prices Near $85 Amid Escalating U.S.-Iran Conflict in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Brent crude oil nears $85 a barrel, hitting a one-month high as renewed hostilities between Washington and Tehran cloud the outlook for the Strait of Hormuz [3][4].

items.title: Honda Halts Plans for Electric Vehicle Factory in Canada
items.summary: Honda announced it will put a hold on its plans to establish an electric vehicle factory in Canada, marking a significant shift in its North American manufacturing strategy [5].

items.title: Morgan Stanley Posts Record Quarterly Revenue and Profit as Equities Trading Surges
items.summary: Morgan Stanley reported record quarterly revenue and profit, driven by a 69% surge in equities trading, benefiting from higher trading and investment banking activity [11].

items.title: U.S. Imposes New 25% Tariffs on Some Brazilian Imports Over Trade Tensions
items.summary: The U.S. announced new 25% tariffs on certain Brazilian imports amid trade tensions over alleged unfair practices, though beef, coffee, and rare-earth materials were exempted [3][13].

items.title: China's Q2 GDP Growth Slows to 4.3%, Weakest Pace Since 2022
items.summary: China's economy grew 4.3% in the second quarter, the weakest pace since 2022, despite strong export growth and a trade surplus exceeding $1.2 trillion [8][12].

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh Confirms Fed Will Set Rates Without Political Consideration
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh stated in his first congressional testimony that the Fed will continue to set interest rates without considering politics [10].

items.title: Short Sellers Load Up Against SpaceX as Stock Retreats to IPO Price
items.summary: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, as the stock retreats back to its IPO price [11].

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Retreat as U.S. Strikes Iran; BTC Holds Near $63,860
items.summary: Bitcoin fell back to approximately $63,860–$63,890 on July 17 after giving back midweek gains, while Ethereum nears $1,900 amid $53.83 million daily ETF inflows; macro tension escalated as the U.S. launched airstrikes on Iranian facilities, causing Hormuz shipping to collapse 60%.

items.title: Morgan Stanley Completes Full Launch of Spot BTC, ETH, and SOL Trading on E*Trade
items.summary: Morgan Stanley’s E*Trade platform fully launched spot trading for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana via Zero Hash, allowing qualified customers to trade with a 0.5% fee, expanding institutional access to major cryptocurrencies.

items.title: Crypto.com Secures $400M Strategic Investment from Citadel Securities, Valued at $20B
items.summary: Crypto.com announced a $400 million strategic investment from Citadel Securities, valuing the digital asset platform at $20 billion and marking its first major institutional funding round to expand digital finance infrastructure.

items.title: ONDO Surges 15% After Ondo Finance and SBI Group Announce Japan Tokenization Deal
items.summary: ONDO token jumped 15% following the announcement of a collaboration between Ondo Finance and Japan’s SBI Group to develop real-world asset (RWA) tokenization, signaling growing institutional adoption in Japan.

items.title: U.S. DOJ Charges Two Chinese Citizens for Laundering $43M in Pig-Butchering Scam
items.summary: The U.S. Department of Justice charged two Chinese nationals for laundering over $43 million linked to a “pig butchering” scam, highlighting ongoing regulatory crackdowns on crypto-enabled fraud.

items.title: Zcash (ZEC) Rises 22.87% Weekly as Privacy Coin Recovers Post-Vulnerability Disclosure
items.summary: Privacy-focused Zcash gained 22.87% over the past week, recovering significant losses after a vulnerability disclosure, as traders reassess its security and utility.

items.title: Binance Recovers $1B in User Funds to Combat Illicit Activity
items.summary: Binance successfully recovered $1 billion in user funds tied to illicit activity, reinforcing its shift toward compliance leadership while underscoring persistent challenges in crypto fraud prevention.

items.title: Polygon Labs Announces Second Round of 2026 Layoffs to Target 2027 Profitability
items.summary: Polygon Labs confirmed its second round of layoffs in 2026 as it pivots toward achieving profitability by 2027, reflecting broader industry cost-cutting amid market volatility.

items.title: U.S. Adds Four Iran Central Bank Crypto Wallets to Sanctions List
items.summary: The U.S. government sanctioned four crypto wallets linked to Iran’s Central Bank, expanding financial restrictions amid escalating military tensions in the region.

items.title: Tether Freezes $131M in TRON-Based Addresses Linked to $165M in Held Funds
items.summary: Tether froze $131 million across TRON-based addresses that held over $165 million, preventing transfers or redemptions as part of its anti-fraud and compliance measures.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Moonshot AI Releases Kimi K3, a 2.8T-Parameter Model Rivaling Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5
items.summary: Moonshot AI launched Kimi K3, its most capable model with 2.8 trillion parameters, claiming it rivals Anthropic's Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5, and plans to release model weights by July 27.

items.title: EU Orders Google to Provide Rival AI Assistants Comparable Android and Search Data Access
items.summary: The European Union issued two Digital Markets Act decisions ordering Google to grant rival AI assistants and search engines comparable access to Android and specific Search data.

items.title: Nvidia Unveils Cosmos 3 Edge for Real-Time Robot and AI Agent Navigation
items.summary: Nvidia announced Cosmos 3 Edge, a world model enabling robots and AI agents to perceive and navigate physical environments in real time, expanding its physical AI ecosystem in Japan.

items.title: Trump Administration Lifts Cybersecurity Ban on Anthropic's Latest Claude Models
items.summary: The US government ended a weeks-long ban on Anthropic's latest Claude chatbot versions, including Fable and Mythos models, clearing them for global release after safety testing.

items.title: Apple Secures China Government Approval for AI System, Clearing iPhone Service Roadblock
items.summary: Apple's artificial-intelligence system received Chinese government approval, removing a major barrier to introducing the service in the world's largest smartphone market.

items.title: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs Launch Bioresilience Program for Pathogen Surveillance
items.summary: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs initiated a bioresilience program leveraging AI models for pathogen surveillance, vaccine design, and outbreak response capabilities.

items.title: Netflix Used Generative AI in Roughly 300 Titles This Year for Post-Production Efficiency
items.summary: Netflix reported using generative AI in approximately 300 titles this year, primarily in post-production to create enhanced crowds, battle sequences, and worldbuilding shots at lower costs.

items.title: Twenty-Nine Countries Sign Agreement to Establish World AI Cooperation Organization
items.summary: Twenty-nine nations signed an agreement to create the World AI Cooperation Organization, an intergovernmental body China says will promote international cooperation and global AI governance.

items.title: Meta Pulls AI Image Feature After Backlash Over Instagram Account Usage
items.summary: Meta discontinued a new AI image feature that allowed users to generate images from public Instagram profiles without notifying account holders, following global criticism.

items.title: Google Updates AI Video Editor Vids with Gemini Omni and Custom Avatar Creation
items.summary: Google updated its AI video editor Vids with Gemini Omni integration and a new feature enabling users to create custom digital avatars using a selfie and voice recording.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Marvel's Wolverine Confirmed for September 15, 2026 Release with New Cinematic Trailer
items.summary: Insomniac Games released a new cinematic trailer titled 'Ain't No Hero' reaffirming Marvel's Wolverine's official launch date of September 15, 2026, while PlayStation faces backlash over plans to eliminate disc support.

items.title: Roblox Launches 'Build': Mobile-First AI Game Creation Tool
items.summary: Roblox announced 'Build' on July 16, a mobile-first AI creation tool allowing users to create games on their phones, expanding the platform beyond play and publishing.

items.title: EA Sports FC 27 Set for September 25, 2026 Launch Across Multiple Platforms
items.summary: Insider billbil-kun reports EA Sports FC 27 will launch on September 25, 2026, for PS4, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch, PS5, Xbox Series X/S, and Switch 2.

items.title: NHL 27 Revealed with New Broadcast Setup and Return of Online Mode
items.summary: EA Sports released the reveal trailer for NHL 27, showcasing a new broadcast setup and the return of an online mode missing for years, with a September launch on PS5 and Xbox Series X/S.

items.title: FromSoftware's 'The Duskbloods' Switch 2 Exclusive Gets August Network Test
items.summary: The Duskbloods, FromSoftware's Nintendo Switch 2 exclusive, will begin a network test in August, ahead of its late July release window for the console.

items.title: Oblivion Remastered Announced for Nintendo Switch 2 on August 11
items.summary: Oblivion Remastered is confirmed for Nintendo Switch 2 with an August 11 release date, running at 30fps in both docked and handheld modes.

items.title: Nintendo to End Support for Mario Kart Tour in September
items.summary: Nintendo is continuing its retreat from mobile gaming by ending support for Mario Kart Tour in September, though it recently launched a new mobile title called Pictonico.

items.title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls Open Beta Trailer Released
items.summary: Arc System Works dropped a new trailer for Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls, highlighting the game's highly anticipated open beta phase for the upcoming superhero fighting title.

items.title: Epic Games Store Free Weekends: Echo Generation and Luto Available Until July 23
items.summary: The Epic Games Store is offering two free titles, Echo Generation: Midnight Edition and Luto, permanently claimable until July 23, alongside a separate giveaway for The Ouroboros King on mobile.

items.title: PowerWash Simulator 2 STAR WARS Pack DLC Now Available
items.summary: FuturLab released the STAR WARS Pack DLC for PowerWash Simulator 2, now available on PC, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, and Nintendo Switch 2.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Uber Launches $14.8B Takeover Offer for Delivery Hero
items.summary: Uber has made a public takeover offer for German food delivery company Delivery Hero, valuing it at $14.8 billion to create the world's largest food-delivery firm outside China.

items.title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over Alleged Trade Secret Theft
items.summary: Apple filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI and two former employees of stealing trade secrets to develop upcoming AI hardware gadgets, sending shockwaves through Silicon Valley.

items.title: TSMC Plans $100B Expansion of US Manufacturing Capacity
items.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC), the world's largest advanced chipmaker, announced plans to invest another $100 billion to expand its manufacturing facilities in the United States.

items.title: PayPal Shares Surge 17% Following $53B Acquisition Offer
items.summary: PayPal Holdings shares jumped 17% after Stripe and private equity firm Advent International made a joint acquisition offer valuing the payments company at over $20 billion.

items.title: Trump Media Launches 'Truth API' for Real-Time Social Data
items.summary: Trump Media & Technology Group launched 'Truth API,' a data feed providing businesses real-time access to posts from top-ranking Truth Social accounts, including quicker market-moving access for Wall Street firms.

items.title: Micron Technology Secures Long-Term Agreements for AI Vehicle Chips
items.summary: Micron Technology signed long-term agreements with automotive suppliers Qualcomm and Harman to secure memory and storage components essential for powering AI-enabled vehicles.

items.title: EU Forces Google to Share Search Data and Open Android
items.summary: The European Union issued new rules requiring Google to share search data and open its Android operating system to rival companies to comply with regulations curbing Big Tech power.

items.title: China Temporarily Blocks Helium Exports Amid Supply Disruption
items.summary: China has temporarily blocked helium exports, a critical element for chipmaking, as escalating global tensions disrupt supply chains.
